posts.author: Agnieszka (Agnieszka Cichocka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there!
I’m a team member of researchers from a Deviniti, a company which an app vendor and a partner of monday.com. It’s extremely important to us to create products that bring real value to our users. In order to accurately address your needs, we have to first learn more about them. That’s why I prepared a survey with various questions about the needs within monday.com. I would be very grateful if you would take a moment to fill it out. It should not take more than 10 minutes. Thank you in advance
A survey link https://forms.gle/CfDyBS7tZ5YN6TpCA
